messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0112",
  "title": "RPG手游 投放趋势观察",
  "page_index": 57,
  "page_range": "57-58"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0113",
    "title": "RPG手游 热门创意策略",
    "page_range": "58-59",
    "summary": "**Topics:** RPG mobile game advertising creative strategies, popular gameplay genres, standard ad creative templates, future creative trends, advertiser activity trends, and creative volume trends.

**Entities:** 
- Platform/Source: 广大大 (GuangdaDa)
- Game Category: RPG手游 (RPG Mobile Games)
- Popular Gameplay Types: 放置 (Idle), 肉鸽 (Roguelike), MMO, 回合制 (Turn-based), 开放世界 (Open World), 二次元 (Anime-style), 漫改 (Manga/Comic Adaptation)
- Creative Tropes/Elements: AI角色抢镜, 奇特肉鸽道具展示, 多次交战/转换地图, 故意失败, 捏脸展示, 地图展示, 职业展示, 连击大数字通关
- Emerging/Niche Themes: 武侠 (Martial Arts), 怪谈 (Supernatural Tales)
- Subgenre Note: 模拟玩法 (Simulation), specifically 写实经营 (Realistic Management)

**Dates:** January 2025 to December 2025 (monthly breakdowns provided for all metrics).

**Definitions/Procedures:** 
- Outlines a standard RPG ad creative sequence/template: AI character introduction → unique roguelike item showcase → multiple battles/map transitions → intentional failure → character customization (捏脸) → map display → class display → high-damage combo clearance.

**Claims:** 
- Exaggerated skill effects and rich art assets are the primary features highlighted in RPG ads.
- Niche themes like martial arts (武侠) and supernatural tales (怪谈) are experiencing rising popularity.
- Realistic management mechanics within simulation gameplay show strong performance.
- Classic user-acquisition (买量) creatives have a higher reuse rate in this category compared to other game genres.

**Tables/Figures & Metrics:** 
- Figure 1: 广告主数量月度变化趋势 (Monthly Advertiser Count Trend)
  - Y-axis range: 5.5K–7.5K advertisers
  - Metric: 投放新素材广告主占比 (Percentage of advertisers launching new creatives), monthly values ranging from 74.3% to 87.0%
- Figure 2: 月均在投素材量变化趋势 (Monthly Average Active Creatives Trend)
  - Y-axis range: 0–20..."
  }
]

message.content: This section examines advertising trends for RPG mobile games (RPG手游) from January to December 2025, utilizing analytics from the 广大大 (GuangdaDa) platform. **Topics** cover creative strategy evolution, advertiser activity, creative volume trends, and popular gameplay genres including Idle, Roguelike, MMO, Turn-based, Open World, Anime-style, and Manga/Comic Adaptation. **Entities** highlight emerging themes (Martial Arts, Supernatural Tales), specific creative tropes (AI character intros, unique item showcases, intentional failure, character customization, high-damage combos), and a high-performing subgenre (Realistic Management Simulation). **Procedures/Definitions** outline a standardized RPG ad creative sequence: AI character introduction → unique roguelike item showcase → multiple battles/map transitions → intentional failure → character customization → map/class display → high-damage combo clearance. **Claims** assert that exaggerated skill effects and rich art assets are primary ad features, niche themes are rising in popularity, realistic management mechanics show strong performance, and classic user-acquisition creatives exhibit a higher reuse rate in RPGs compared to other game genres. **Figures & Metrics** include Figure 1 (Monthly Advertiser Count Trend: 5.5K–7.5K advertisers, with 74.3%–87.0% launching new creatives monthly) and Figure 2 (Monthly Average Active Creatives Trend). **Evidence Types** consist of platform-derived monthly metric breakdowns, comparative genre performance data, and longitudinal trend analysis across the 2025 calendar year.
